data.body:
if independence
is all that we
make it to be
then why
in olden times
were titles of
exile and outcast
among the worst
one could bear?

having that same
independence
forced upon you
reveals the lie
of individualism
the claim that we
in our wisdom
no longer need
anyone

#WritingCommunity #Poetry
